name: AF Unmasked
description: Structure prediction using multimeric template information for assembly of subunits. Generates high quality (DockQ > 0.8) structures even with no evolutionary information and imperfect templates.
capabilities: Structure prediction using multimeric template information for assembly of subunits
Generates high quality (DockQ > 0.8) structures even with no evolutionary information and imperfect templates

sequence.description: Protein amino acid sequence. Use ':' to separate chains for multimers.

templateFiles.description: Multimeric template PDB files to guide structure assembly of subunits

numModels.description: Number of structure models to generate
